arts.ttl: Barcelona, Sidibe and Narcis Pelach's brilliant Stoke City 'dream' for 2025
arts.sum: "Everything about Stoke City is exciting, hopefully we can build something together, but for being there in that moment we need to fight today and this is the way I see it. "Of course he will be very important for Stoke City and hopefully he can be a great player for us in the future, which I am very positive about what he can get - but it doesn't mean that I'm not going to push him.

arts.ttl: 'Football isn't the be-all and end-all' - Stoke's Nathan Lowe on loan life and his degree
arts.sum: Stoke City forward Nathan Lowe has been in sensational form on loan at Walsall, with the youngster's impressive tally of goal contributions landing him the EFL Young Player of the Month award
